note: Project-level rollup. Authoritative per-repo detail lives in each repo's .graphed/state.json. See .graphed/SCHEMA.md for the update discipline. ORCH, M0 (6 repos), M0.5, M1, M2, and M3 are DONE and CI-green (M3: awkward typetracer forms + real provenance + correctionlib/ONNX External payloads; ADL 1-8 + AGC slice record metadata-only). Next: M4 (graphed-core optimizer: DCE/CSE/canonicalization + equality-saturation stage fusion via egg).

ORCH.title: Deterministic orchestrator engine (Part B + B.8 faker suite)
ORCH.evidence: 41 frozen tests, 97% line+branch coverage, mypy --strict clean, CI green on A.5 matrix incl. 3.13t/3.14/3.14t

M0.title: Repository spine (per repo)
M0.note: DONE for both existing repos; replicated per-repo as new package repos are created

M0.5.title: Reference corpus study & Required Operations Catalog
M0.5.evidence: ops_catalog + 23 runnable fixtures (ADL 1-8, AGC ttbar 2x5, TTGamma) reproducing stored references bit-for-bit on the full OS matrix; 60 frozen tests; graph-bloat note. Synthetic data + ONNX fixture flagged Phase-2.

M1.title: graphed-core thread-safe interned graph IR
M1.evidence: interning by structural hash; External PayloadDescriptor in hash; total-order float hashing (NaN self-interns, 0.0/-0.0 distinct); single-Mutex Send+Sync verified by loom + multi-thread stress; PyO3 gil_used=false. 21 frozen Python tests + 6 cargo tests + loom; CI green on A.5 matrix incl. free-threaded 3.13t/3.14/3.14t. No unsafe.

M2.title: frontend + backend protocol + graphed-numpy
M2.evidence: deferred Array proxy records backend-agnostic IR into graphed-core; one node+form per op, repeated sub-exprs intern to zero nodes; backend-independence proven (two toy backends, identical to_dot, different results); map->External with preservation-risk descriptor; provenance stub raises ill-typed ops at the user's source line. graphed 12 tests/94%, graphed-numpy 14 tests/100%. CI green on A.5 matrix.

M3.title: graphed-awkward typetracer forms + provenance
M3.evidence: AwkwardBackend op_form via awkward typetracer (metadata-only, no data read) + real eval via one shared dispatch; gak namespace mirrors the awkward API. ADL queries 1-8 + AGC object-selection slice all record metadata-only with correct forms; materialize matches plain awkward; every node maps to a user line. Real provenance (graphed) with sub-expression text via executing, toggle, helper/comprehension survival. correctionlib + ONNX External nodes content-hash the file. graphed 24 tests/91%, graphed-awkward 32 tests/98%. CI green on A.5 matrix.

M4.title: graphed-core optimizer: DCE/CSE + equality-saturation stage fusion
M4.note: next: RewriteEngine trait (egg behind it), DCE/CSE outside engine, incremental reduction, super-linear-scaling CI benchmark. Hardest milestone.

M6.title: graphed-debug: opt-level lowering, source-mapped tracebacks, viz
